fix: revert provider source and format terraform files

back to azurenoops/azurenoopsutils since the provider is only published
under the azurenoops namespace on the Terraform Registry.
Also ran terraform fmt to fix formatting from prior version line removal.

commit.message:
plugins: add missing Zig binding types matching Python counterparts

Append types and methods to 6 Zig files to match their Python sources:

- context_base.zig: ReplyOptions, BaseContext (state, replies, middleware)
- context_tdlib.zig: InlineKeyboardButton, InlineKeyboard, ChatAction, TdlibContext
- modules.zig: ModuleState, ModuleInfo, PluginModule, ModuleManager
- router.zig: HandlerType, FilterMode, CommandHandler, MessageHandler,
  CallbackHandler, PluginRouter
- registry.zig: PluginState, PluginPriority, PluginMetaInfo, PluginStateRegistry
- loader.zig: PluginLoadError, DependencyError, ConflictError, LoadResult,
  BatchLoadResult, FullPluginLoader

All types use PascalCase, functions use camelCase.
Includes comprehensive test suites for each new type.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add public KV store methods to Zig storage backends matching Python API

Each storage backend struct now has public methods matching the Python
counterpart interface:

- base.zig: Added NotFoundError, AlreadyExistsError, SerializationErrorInfo,
  ConnectionErrorInfo structured error types
- All backends: Added open(), close(), get(), set(), delete(), has(), count(),
  clear(), keys(), values(), items() as public methods on the struct
- sqlite.zig, lmdb.zig: Added begin(), commit(), rollback() transaction methods
- Renamed internal vtable functions to *Impl suffix to avoid name conflicts
- Fixed var->const for test config variables (Zig 0.13 compliance)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(storage/zig): add public API methods to storage backends

Add public convenience methods matching the Python storage API to all
5 Zig storage backend structs (mongodb, pickledb, redis, sqlite, tinydb).

Each struct now exposes these public methods on Self:
- openStorage, closeStorage: connection lifecycle
- getValue, setValue, deleteKey: CRUD operations
- hasKey, countKeys, clearAll: existence/count/clear
- getKeys, getValues, getItems: bulk retrieval

commit.message:
feat(v): extend storage and i18n V bindings to 100% Python parity

Storage module:
- base.v: Add pattern-filtered keys, TTL support (expire/ttl/persist),
  atomic operations (increment/decrement), info/ping, export/import
  data, backup/restore, and storage statistics
- factory.v: Add register_backend(), get_registered_backends(), and
  create_from_config() methods
- storage.v: Add default/fallback backend support on StorageManager
  with automatic fallback get/set/delete/exists operations

i18n module:
- Add fallback_locale field to I18n struct
- TranslationCatalog: add remove(), remove_context(), clear() methods
- I18n: add get_translation(), add_translation(), remove_translation(),
  export_translations(), import_translations(), merge_translations(),
  clear(), stats(), validate_translations(), has_key(), plural(),
  load_directory(), load_translations_path() methods
- TranslationLoader: add load_from_po(), load_from_yaml(),
  load_directory() functions
- Add locale-aware formatting: format_number_locale(),
  format_date_locale(), format_currency_locale()
- Global API: add set_global_fallback_locale, add/remove/has/clear
  global translations, global_stats, translate_plural

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Sync with copilot-sdk: ignore cliPath when cliUrl is set (#44)

When cli_url is provided, cliPath should not be resolved.
The Laravel SDK already handles this correctly via TCP mode, but
now ProcessManager throws a descriptive error when the CLI binary
cannot be found, matching the official SDK behavior.

Official SDK: ab8cc5a [nodejs] Ignore `cliPath` if `cliUrl` is set (#787)

Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: laravel-copilot-sdk
repository.description: Laravel version of GitHub Copilot SDK

commit.message:
Add high-level Zig bindings matching Python media API

Add subprocess-based types to the media module Zig bindings that
mirror the Python bindings API:

- image.zig: ResizeMode, FilterType, ImageFormat enums and
  ImageProcessor struct (init, resize, crop, rotate, applyFilter,
  getInfo, convertFormat) using ImageMagick/FFmpeg
- video.zig: ProcessorVideoInfo with toJson, VideoProcessor struct
  (init, getInfo, getDuration, getResolution, getCodec, extractFrame,
  trim, videoResize, convertFormat, extractAudio), and toJson on
  existing VideoInfo
- audio.zig: ProcessorAudioInfo with toJson, AudioProcessor struct
  (init, getInfo, convert, trim, merge, changeVolume, extractSegment,
  getDuration, getFormat), and toJson on existing AudioInfo
- thumbnail.zig: CropStrategy enum and ThumbnailGenerator struct
  (init, generateImageThumbnail, generateVideoThumbnail,
  generateThumbnailGrid, generateAnimatedThumbnail)

All implementations use std.process.Child to spawn ffmpeg/imagemagick
commands, matching the Python subprocess-based approach.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(zig): add missing types/functions to utils Zig bindings

Add Zig implementations matching Python counterparts for:
- hash.zig: md5, sha1, sha256, sha512 (raw, hex, file variants)
- text.zig: base64, URL encode/decode, trim, strip, split, join,
  case conversion, slugify, startsWith/endsWith/contains
- time.zig: Duration/Time structs, now, monotonic, formatTime,
  ISO 8601 parse/format, humanize, parseDuration, sleep
- cache.zig: has, delete, clear, count methods + Cache alias
- versions.zig: formatted, fullInfo, checkCompatibility, getInfo
- message_utils.zig: stripMarkdown
- git.zig: gitFetch, gitCheckout, gitRebase, getCommitHash,
  GitHubAPI struct with releases/download methods
- decorators.zig: typingAction, logCommand, decorator builders

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: extend D bindings for config and storage to reach Python parity

Config module:
- Add ConfigError and ValidationError exception classes
- Add AuthMode and LogLevel enums
- Add DatabaseConfig and ProxyConfig structs with toDict/fromDict
- Add Config class with full serialization, get/set, merge, clone, validate
- Add ConfigBuilder with fluent API (30+ setter methods)
- Add ConfigValidator with validate and validateStrict
- Add preset factory functions (defaultConfig, botConfig, userConfig, etc)

Storage module:
- Add D operator overloads to StorageDefaults mixin for dict-like access
- Add StorageGuard struct and scopedStorage() for RAII resource management
- Add destructor to StorageManager for automatic cleanup
- Add operator overloads to CachedStorage
- Add null-field validation to Model.setField in ORM layer

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add 15 missing Go bindings to match Python parity

Modules covered:
- api: api_adapter.go (APIAdapter, Backend types, IAPIServer interface)
- media: examples.go (demo runners), setup.go (package metadata)
- storage: duckdb.go, factory.go, orm.go, pickledb.go, tinydb.go
  (DuckDB/TinyDB/PickleDB backends, StorageFactory, ORM layer)
- telegram: botapi.go (TeleBot HTTP client), router.go (plugin dispatch),
  tdlib_installer.go (TDLib download/build)
- utils: compression.go (GZIP/ZSTD), json_utils.go (JSONValue wrapper),
  retry.go (exponential backoff), system.go (env/process/platform)

All Go files use idiomatic Go patterns matching existing codebase
conventions (sentinel errors, BaseStorage embedding, Config type).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

nim: 100% API parity with Python across all 20 modules

Created:
- media/examples.nim — port of all 6 example functions
- media/setup.nim — package metadata and dependency checks

Updated with missing Python API functions:
- utils/hash.nim — full md5/sha1/sha256/sha512 (raw, hex, file variants)
- utils/text.nim — url_encode/decode, base64, slugify, to_upper/lower/title
- utils/time.nim — Time/Duration types, now, parse, iso8601, sleep
- utils/filesystem.nim — exists, read/write/append, dir ops, stat, copy/move
- utils/versions.nim — formatted, fullInfo, checkCompatibility
- utils/meta.nim — extractDocstringMeta
- utils/errors.nim — formatExc, formatTelegramRpcError, printExc
- utils/git.nim — getReleases, downloadAsset, downloadAssetForPlatform
- storage/{duckdb,lmdb,mongodb,pickledb,redis,tinydb}.nim — missing ops

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- api: api_adapter.rs, lib.rs

commit.message:
fix: C 100% quality audit — 36 files created, 11 fixed

Created 36 new C files:
- 10 facade .c implementations for umbrella headers
- 4 media files (metadata, thumbnail)
- 10 text files (analyzer, formatter, parser, sanitizer, translator)
- 12 utils files (compression, json_utils, random, retry, system, validation)

Fixed 11 files:
- 3 umbrella headers (media.h, text.h, utils.h) — added includes
- Type conflict in security/licensing_manager.h
- Missing typedefs/includes in core, text
- Cross-module include paths

Result: 0 missing .c for .h, 0 compile errors

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: correct cross-module include paths for zsys_core.h

Fix relative include paths from ../../core to ../../../core
for bind_*.c and zsys_*.c files across i18n, log, plugins,
storage, and utils modules.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: Python 100% quality audit — 17 files fixed across 13 modules

Critical fixes:
- media/__init__.py: resolved audio.py/audio/ conflict, added C-binding exports
- text/__init__.py: added missing common function exports + submodule namespaces
- data/__init__.py: was EMPTY — added 54 imports/exports for ORM + schemas
- security/__init__.py: was EMPTY — added 20 imports/exports
- transport/__init__.py: fixed broken import path (infra → http)
- storage/factory.py: fixed NameError (List → list)
- log/base.py: implemented get_logger() factory (was missing)

Quality: crypto/config/services/utils — graceful C-lib degradation
Tests: 35→51 passed, 9→6 failed, 7→5 errors

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(python): audit and fix all 20 module bindings to 100% quality

- media: fix broken __init__.py imports; resolve audio.py/audio/ dir conflict
  using importlib.util; add C-binding API re-exports (MediaType, MediaInfo, etc.)
- text: fix broken __init__.py imports; add common functions (escape_html, etc.)
  and submodule namespace re-exports (html, markdown, parse, format)
- data: add missing __all__ and proper imports for ORM models + Pydantic schemas
- security: add missing __all__ and imports for AESCipher, RSACipher, ECCCipher,
  ChaChaEncryption, crypto utils, and licensing
- services: fix __getattr__ to handle missing aiohttp gracefully; populate __all__
- crypto: add Crypto class and convenience functions to __all__; add type hints;
  graceful degradation when C library is missing (CRYPTO_AVAILABLE flag)
- transport: fix broken import from nonexistent .infra to use .http; add
  list_available_backends to __all__
- log: implement missing get_logger() factory function used by 5+ modules;
  add to __all__ exports
- storage: fix NameError 'List' -> 'list' in factory.py type annotation
- config: add env.py re-exports (env, load_env, get_env_path) to __all__
- utils: graceful degradation when libzsys_utils.so is not available
- media/__init__.py, text/__init__.py: use standard contextlib.suppress pattern
- services/__init__.py, utils/__init__.py: wrap star imports in suppress

Test results: 51 passed (was 35), 6 failed (was 9), 5 collection errors (was 7)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: bump v2.23.12, update changelogs and history

commit.message:
feat: auto-update option for LXC installations

Add AUTO_UPDATE config toggle (off by default). When enabled on
LXC/systemd, the hourly update checker automatically runs upgrade.sh
after detecting a new version — no manual action needed.

- New config key AUTO_UPDATE in DEFAULT_CONFIG and allowed_keys
- Toggle in web UI under Updates section (standalone only)
- _should_auto_update() checks config + runtime (LXC only, not Docker/HA)
- _auto_apply_update() runs upgrade.sh in executor with 120s timeout
- /api/update/info returns auto_update status

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(rust): reach 100% Python parity for config bindings

Add missing types, traits, and functions to match all Python modules:

Constants (constants.py):
- APP_NAME, APP_VERSION, APP_AUTHOR, BOT_PREFIX, BOT_MAX_COMMANDS

Env (env.py):
- Env::get_float, Env::get_env_list
- set_env(), unset_env()

Config (config.py):
- Error types: ConfigError, ValidationError
- Enums: AuthMode, LogLevel
- Structs: DatabaseConfig, ProxyConfig, ZsysConfig (full Config dataclass)
- ZsysConfig methods: to_dict/from_dict, to_json/from_json, save/load,
  get/set, merge, validate/is_valid
- ZsysConfigBuilder with full fluent API (30+ builder methods)
- ConfigValidator with validate() and validate_strict()
- Preset factories: default_config, bot_config, user_config,
  minimal_config, test_config
- Top-level loaders: config_from_file, config_from_env, config_from_dict

Dependencies: added serde + serde_json to Cargo.toml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: complete V bindings for plugins, api, and control modules

Add missing functions/structs/methods to achieve Python parity:

Plugins module:
- router.v: HandlerType/FilterMode enums, CommandHandler/MessageHandler/
  CallbackHandler structs, Command.matches()/full_usage()/to_map(),
  Router rate limiting, sub-routers, message/callback handlers,
  enable/disable, owner/admin management, help text generation, reset
- loader.v: LoadResult/BatchLoadResult structs, plugin dir management,
  reload/unload_all/reload_all, init/cleanup hooks, load stats, reset
- registry.v: PluginState/PluginPriority enums, state management,
  enable/disable, config storage, lifecycle hooks, dependency resolution,
  load ordering, stats
- watcher.v: WatchEventType enum, WatchEvent/WatcherConfig structs,
  directory management, event handlers, check() for manual polling,
  file tracking, stats, reset
- context_base.v: ReplyOptions struct, full BaseContext with state
  management, reply queuing (text/photo/document/sticker/callback/
  edit/delete/forward), middleware data, raw update storage
- context_tdlib.v: InlineKeyboardButton/InlineKeyboard/ChatAction
  structs, sender/chat/message/media info setters, reply methods
  (video/audio/voice/location/contact), admin actions (pin/ban/
  unban/promote), chat actions, serialization
- modules.v: ModuleState enum, ModuleInfo struct, PluginModule with
  full lifecycle (init/start/stop), command/handler/cleanup management,
  ModuleManager with dependency resolution, batch lifecycle ops
- examples: Enhanced help/ping/say with module list, pong, code
  formatting, reply mode

API module:
- api_adapter.v: RouteHandler type, AdapterRoute struct, APIRouteAdapter
  with register_route/handle_request/get_routes/remove_route
- base.v: Route struct, BaseRouter with prefix-based grouping and
  HTTP method helpers (get/post/put/delete)

Control module:
- control.v: ControlConfig with owner/allowed users/validation,
  BotControl with start/stop/restart, module load/unload/reload,
  status/uptime, command registration/execution, owner command handling

commit.message:
feat: implement C bindings for zsys transport module

Add 10 header+source files for the transport C FFI layer:
- http/base.h+c: BaseHttpClient vtable, response/headers types, URL builder, header merger
- http/retry.h+c: Retry policy with exponential backoff, jitter, status checking
- http/client.h+c: Concrete HttpClient with retry, JSON/text/binary helpers, download
- wss/wss.h+c: WebSocket placeholder
- transport.h+c: Module init, backend listing

All compile clean with gcc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -pedantic.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: security hardening for findings 2-10 (#87)

* feat: security hardening for findings 2-10

- Fix .gitignore casing for appsettings.development.json
- Restrict Swagger UI to development environment only
- Use constant-time password comparison (CryptographicOperations.FixedTimeEquals)
- Add HTTP security headers middleware (X-Frame-Options, CSP-adjacent, etc.)
- Add same-origin CORS policy
- Replace ex.Message with generic error messages in API responses
- Gate debug endpoints behind admin authentication
- Add rate limiting (5 req/min) on admin login endpoint
- Replace static Dictionary with ConcurrentDictionary + 10-min TTL for OAuth state
- Add OAuthStateTtlTests for state eviction and one-time-use verification

* fix: address PR review feedback

- SecureCompare uses SHA-256 hashes to prevent length-based timing leaks
- Path traversal prevention in GetAdminJsonPath
- Extracted StateTtl constant in DaikinOAuthService
- Added TimeProvider for deterministic TTL testing
- Added TTL expiration and eviction tests with FakeTimeProvider
- Updated test XML doc to match coverage
- Added AddCors/UseCors same-origin CORS policy
- AdminRepository.CheckAdminAccess uses constant-time comparison

* fix: sanitize storage directory to resolve CodeQL path-injection alerts

- Added GetSafeStorageDirectory() rejecting .. traversal sequences
- LoadAdminJson/SaveAdminJson construct paths inline from sanitized dir
- Resolves CodeQL cs/path-injection alerts

* Update Program.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address PR review feedback

- CORS: restrict to exact scheme+host+port (not all localhost ports)
- Rate limiter: partition per remote IP instead of global shared limiter
- CSP: skip for /swagger paths so Swagger UI works in development
- Tests: make EvictExpiredStates test async, assert state3 survives eviction with mock
- Plan: update CORS step to reflect actual AddCors/UseCors implementation

* fix: address PR review feedback

- Refactor LoadAdminJson/SaveAdminJson to use GetAdminJsonPath, removing dead code duplication

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
